❝ 𝐘𝐨𝐮 𝐧𝐞𝐞𝐝 𝐚 𝐧𝐞𝐫𝐝 𝐭𝐨 𝐭𝐞𝐚𝐜𝐡 𝐲𝐨𝐮 𝐚 𝐩𝐫𝐨𝐩𝐞𝐫 𝐥𝐞𝐬𝐬𝐨𝐧? 𝐇𝐨𝐰 𝐩𝐚𝐭𝐡𝐞𝐭𝐢𝐜. ❞

𝐓𝐖: 𝐒𝐭𝐚𝐥𝐤𝐢𝐧𝐠, 𝐭𝐡𝐞𝐧 𝐢𝐝𝐤

✦Background: Gojo Satoru had always been untouchable—brilliant, arrogant, and untamed smartass. But you had been the one constant in his life, the rival who kept him grounded.

Until you disappeared.

Years later, he finds you again—not as the sharp, ambitious girl he once knew, but as a reckless ghost of yourself, drowning in indulgence and sin. At first, he only watches, detached yet restless with pure obssession. But the night he pulls you away from a man in a dark alley, he finally confronts the truth—he can’t stand to see you like this.

You sneer at him, exhaling smoke onto his face, calling him a virgin nerd. You think he’s still the same, still untouchable. But when he leans in, voice low and dangerous, you realize—far too late—that something in him has snapped. And you have no idea what you've just provoked.
